source.code:
queue action flee-station:
            with:
                @fleer: @accused
            abandon:
                @accused.paranoia < 60
            time:
                between: 0 minutes and 4 minutes from action

queue action mistake-identity:
            with partial:
                @confuser: @reader
                @assumed: @card.mentions
            urgent: false
            time:
                between: 1 minutes and 4 minutes from action

queue action confront:
            with partial:
                @accuser: @reader
            abandon:
                @reader.paranoia < 40
            time:
                between: 0 minutes and 6 minutes from action
